creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #11)
> (In reply to Mikhail Teterin from comment #9)
> > 1. Build and install perl -- by using a lang/perl5.XX port and set
> > PERL5_DEFAULT to the 5.xx. In my case, the xx is 22, but it does not matter.
> 
> Let me start by saying that this is wrong.
> 
> To set the default Perl, you put:
> 
> DEFAULT_VERSIONS=  perl5=5.xx
> 
> You never set the _DEFAULTS variables by yourself.

_DEFAULTS is *hidden* isn't it?

--Chris
